glosses.en: to put on makeup; to apply makeup
glosses.vi: trang điểm; trang điểm cho người khác
glosses.ar: يضع المكياج; يضع المكياج لشخص ما
glosses.hi: मेकअप करना; किसी को मेकअप करना
glosses.da: lægge makeup; lægge makeup på nogen
glosses.ja: 化粧する; 人に化粧をする

sentences.target: Je me maquille vite avant la réunion.
sentences.reading: /ʒə mə makij vit avɑ̃ la ʁeynjɔ̃/

translations.fr: Je me maquille vite avant la réunion.
translations.ipa: /ʒə mə makij vit avɑ̃ la ʁeynjɔ̃/
translations.en: I put on makeup quickly before the meeting.
translations.es: Me maquillo rápido antes de la reunión.
translations.de: Ich schminke mich schnell vor der Besprechung.
translations.it: Mi trucco in fretta prima della riunione.
translations.pt: Eu me maquio rápido antes da reunião.
translations.vi: Tôi trang điểm nhanh trước cuộc họp.
translations.nl: Ik maak me snel op voor de vergadering.
translations.hu: Gyorsan kisminkelem magam a megbeszélés előtt.
translations.hi: मैं बैठक से पहले जल्दी मेकअप कर लेती हूँ.
translations.el: Βάζω γρήγορα μακιγιάζ πριν από τη συνάντηση.
translations.nb: Jeg sminker meg raskt før møtet.
translations.sv: Jag sminkar mig snabbt före mötet.
translations.ro: Mă machiez rapid înainte de ședință.
translations.da: Jeg sminker mig hurtigt før mødet.
translations.ja: 会議の前に急いで化粧をします。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (1st person singular); serves as the sentence subject.
Clitic reflexive pronoun (1st person singular) preceding the verb; marks the pronominal construction.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular of ‘maquiller’; pronominal here (se maquiller) meaning ‘to put on makeup’.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase (‘avant la réunion’).
Definite article (feminine singular) determining ‘réunion’.
Common noun (feminine); object of the preposition ‘avant’.

sentences.target: Tu te maquilles un peu, là.

translations.fr: Tu te maquilles un peu, là.
translations.en: You're putting on a bit of makeup now.
translations.es: Te estás maquillando un poco ahora.
translations.de: Du schminkst dich gerade ein bisschen.
translations.it: Ti stai truccando un po' adesso.
translations.pt: Você está se maquiando um pouco agora.
translations.vi: Bạn đang trang điểm một chút bây giờ.
translations.ar: أنتِ تضعين قليلًا من المكياج الآن.
translations.nl: Je doet nu een beetje make-up op.
translations.hi: तुम अभी थोड़ा मेकअप कर रही हो.
translations.ja: 今、少し化粧しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (2nd person singular).
Clitic reflexive pronoun (2nd person singular) before the verb; marks pronominal use.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; pronominal ‘se maquiller’.
Indefinite determiner forming the quantifier ‘un peu’.
Adverb meaning ‘a little’; degree modifier of the verb.
Deictic adverb; here used as a discourse particle adding emphasis/context.

sentences.target: On doit se maquiller pour les photos.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dwa sə makije puʁ le fɔto/

translations.fr: On doit se maquiller pour les photos.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa sə makije puʁ le fɔto/
translations.en: We have to put on makeup for the photos.
translations.es: Tenemos que maquillarnos para las fotos.
translations.de: Wir müssen uns für die Fotos schminken.
translations.pt: Temos que nos maquiar para as fotos.
translations.vi: Chúng ta phải trang điểm để chụp ảnh.
translations.nl: We moeten ons opmaken voor de foto's.
translations.hi: हमें तस्वीरों के लिए मेकअप करना होगा.
translations.el: Πρέπει να βάλουμε μακιγιάζ για τις φωτογραφίες.
translations.nb: Vi må sminke oss til bildene.
translations.sv: Vi måste sminka oss för bilderna.
translations.ro: Trebuie să ne machiem pentru fotografii.
translations.da: Vi skal sminke os til billederne.
translations.ja: 写真のために化粧しないといけません。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject; colloquially means ‘we’.
Modal verb ‘devoir’, present 3rd person singular; takes an infinitive complement.
Clitic reflexive pronoun (3rd person); part of the pronominal infinitive.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal ‘doit’.
Preposition introducing a purpose phrase.
Definite article (plural) determining ‘photos’.
Common noun (plural); object of the preposition ‘pour’.

sentences.target: Je maquille ma sœur avant la fête.
sentences.reading: /ʒə makij ma sœʁ avɑ̃ la fɛt/

translations.fr: Je maquille ma sœur avant la fête.
translations.ipa: /ʒə makij ma sœʁ avɑ̃ la fɛt/
translations.en: I'm doing my sister's makeup before the party.
translations.es: Maquillo a mi hermana antes de la fiesta.
translations.de: Ich schminke meine Schwester vor der Feier.
translations.it: Trucco mia sorella prima della festa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在派对前给我妹妹化妆。
translations.yue: 我喺派對前幫我妹妹化妝。
translations.ru: Я делаю макияж своей сестре перед вечеринкой.
translations.pt: Eu maquio minha irmã antes da festa.
translations.he: אני מאפרת את אחותי לפני המסיבה.
translations.tr: Partiden önce kız kardeşimin makyajını yapıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi trang điểm cho em gái trước bữa tiệc.
translations.nl: Ik maak mijn zus op voor het feest.
translations.uk: Я роблю макіяж своїй сестрі перед вечіркою.
translations.hu: Kisminkelem a húgomat a buli előtt.
translations.hi: मैं पार्टी से पहले अपनी बहन का मेकअप करती हूँ.
translations.pl: Robię makijaż mojej siostrze przed imprezą.
translations.el: Μακιγιάρω την αδερφή μου πριν από το πάρτι.
translations.nb: Jeg sminker søsteren min før festen.
translations.sv: Jag sminkar min syster före festen.
translations.ro: Machiez sora mea înainte de petrecere.
translations.da: Jeg lægger makeup på min søster før festen.
translations.ja: パーティーの前に妹に化粧をしてあげます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (1st person singular).
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; here transitive (to apply makeup to someone).
Possessive determiner (1st person singular, feminine), modifying ‘sœur’.
Common noun (feminine); direct object of the verb.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase (‘avant la fête’).
Definite article (feminine singular) determining ‘fête’.
Common noun (feminine); object of the preposition ‘avant’.
